title: astramem-sync@1 envelope
description: One-way, append-only, idempotent log-shipping envelope (ADR-003). local -> cloud POST /sync/events. Event shape mirrors the memory_events table (migration 007-memory-events.sql) verbatim, with payload_json unwrapped to a plain object on the wire (the DB column stores it as a TEXT-serialized string; the wire form parses it once at the boundary).

cursor.description: Per-device monotonic seq — the last seq the client believes is acked. Resume = send from last ack.

events.description: Batch of memory_events rows in seq order. May be empty (e.g. a capabilities/cursor heartbeat with nothing new to ship).

payload_json.description: Event-specific payload, parsed to a plain object (or null when the row has none).

content_hash.description: Idempotency key — cloud dedups on (workspace_id, content_hash). null only for legacy rows predating hash backfill.

created_at.description: Epoch ms — mirrors memory_events.created_at (INTEGER column), not ISO string, to keep the sync wire shape a 1:1 mirror of the source-of-truth log row.
